SparSCit

Contents:

  • API Reference
SparSCit
  • API Reference
  • Tools (sparscit.tl)
  • View page source

Tools (sparscit.tl)

Core analysis tools for data processing, statistical testing, and annotation. This is the largest submodule, covering filtering, normalization, statistical tests, GO enrichment, regulatory inference, diffusion maps, and more.

Data Processing

  • src.tools._filter.filter() — Filter cells/features by count thresholds

  • src.tools._filter.remove_pc() — Remove principal components

  • src.tools._transpose.transpose_anndata() — Transpose an AnnData object

  • src.tools._combine.stack_adata() — Stack multiple AnnData objects as layers

  • src.tools._combine.X_to_layer() — Move .X into .layers

  • src.tools._combine.set_missing_to_zero() — Add missing features as zero columns

  • src.tools._layers.copy_to_obs() — Copy data from layers to .obs

  • src.tools._layers.make_layer_config() — Create a LayerConfig

  • src.tools._layers.normalize_layers() — Normalize layers

  • src.tools._layers.layer_pick_features() — Select features from a layer

  • src.tools._layers.get_layer_feature_means() — Compute per-feature means

Statistical Testing

  • src.tools._statistics.statistic_test() — Differential testing (t-test, Mann-Whitney U, Wilcoxon, chi-square)

  • src.tools._statistics.likelihood_test() — Likelihood ratio test (JAX-accelerated)

  • src.tools._statistics.likelihood_test_on_adata() — Convenience wrapper for likelihood testing

  • src.tools._statistics.enriched_in_group() — Test for feature enrichment in groups

  • src.tools._statistics.filter_top_markers() — Filter top markers from a Markers result

Annotation & Metadata

  • src.tools._metadata.add_metadata() — Add metadata to .obs

  • src.tools._metabin.add_metabin_metadata() — Add binned metadata

  • src.tools._reference.gene_query() — Query a Reference for gene names

  • src.tools._reference.region_query() — Query a Reference for genomic regions

  • src.tools._reference.add_rna_var_metadata() — Add RNA variable metadata

  • src.tools._reference.symbol2id() — Convert gene symbols to IDs

  • src.tools._reference.get_gene_index() — Get feature index by name

Correlation & Comparison

  • src.tools._corr.group_correlation() — Compute group correlations

  • src.tools._corr.rep_correlation() — Compute replication correlation

GO Enrichment

  • src.tools._goterm.goea() — Gene Ontology Enrichment Analysis

  • src.tools._goterm.top_marker_goea() — GOEA on top markers

Regulation & Inference

  • src.tools._regulation.get_regulatory_links() — Infer regulatory links

  • src.tools._regulation.get_regulatory_matrix() — Build regulatory matrix

  • src.tools._regulation.regulatory_ensure_promoter_included() — Ensure promoters in regulatory links

  • src.tools._inference.infer_layer() — Infer a new layer from GO memberships

  • src.tools._inference.go_infer_layer() — Infer a GO-term-based layer

Diffusion & Pseudotime

  • src.tools._diffmap.diffmap() — Compute diffusion map

  • src.tools._diffmap.diffusion_pseudotime() — Compute diffusion pseudotime

  • src.tools._diffmap.normalize_time_per_cluster() — Normalize pseudotime per cluster

Other

  • src.tools._kmeans.kmeans() — K-means clustering

  • src.tools._load.get_genome_dict() — Get genome dictionary

  • src.tools._metabin.summarize_data() — Summarize data by groups

  • src.tools._metabin.membership_summary() — Summarize data by categorical membership
